# CURRENCY SUMMARY:
# Total USD Exposure: Sum of all USD CHF_Values
# Total EUR Exposure: Sum of all EUR CHF_Values
# Total CHF Exposure: Sum of all CHF CHF_Values
# Total Portfolio: Sum of all CHF_Values
# USD Percentage: (Total USD / Total Portfolio) × 100%
# EUR Percentage: (Total EUR / Total Portfolio) × 100%
# CHF Percentage: (Total CHF / Total Portfolio) × 100%
# TARGET ALLOCATION:
